scripts.build: mkdir -p build && uv run python -m compileall scripts && printf ok > build/skill-build.txt
scripts.format: uv run ruff format scripts && prettier --write SKILL.md package.json reference/*.md
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check scripts && prettier --check SKILL.md package.json reference/*.md
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && uv run python -m compileall scripts && uv run python scripts/smoke.py
